title: Tool-granularity, formal difficulty, and the cost of LLM reasoning on a CSP testbed
description: Reasoning-compiler reconstruction of the claude-sudoku-experiments repo: how MCP tool-set granularity (none/fine/medium/coarse, plus a scratchpad variant) affects an LLM agent (Opus 4.7) solving Slitherlink across a formally-graded difficulty axis. Arc: n=1 pilot -> Phase-1 replication gate -> Phase-2 difficulty frontier -> scratchpad detour -> the G-CD cost model and its Goldilocks revision. Publication target: AAAI-27.
